summary: Recent updates in the WebCodecs area of Firefox focused on improving logging with the introduction of `MOZ_LOG_FMT`. This change enhances the way developers can track and debug issues related to WebCodecs, the technology that allows web applications to efficiently process video and audio streams. While there are no visible changes for users directly, this backend improvement ultimately supports a more stable and reliable experience when using web features like video conferencing or streaming, contributing to a smoother interaction with rich media on the web.
